title: Deduplicate Age and Birth Year
summary: Removed the Birth Year input field. Birth year is now auto-calculated from Current Age via new Date().getFullYear() - currentAge. Files changed: src/ui/form.ts, src/ui/form-schema.ts, src/ui/form.test.ts

title: Update Field Validation and Parsing for Commas
summary: Updated form field validation and parsing to handle comma-separated number formats (e.g. 1,000,000) in numeric inputs

title: Implement Thousand Separators in Currency Inputs
summary: Added thousand separator formatting to currency input fields so users see formatted numbers (e.g. 1,000,000) while entering values
